question: Who was the head coach of the NCAA Division II football team that had no players selected in the 1994 NFL Draft, competed in the same conference as the 1990 Cal State Hayward Pioneers football team during their NCAA Division II season, achieved a 1-2-1 record in that conference during their 1993 season, played their home games at a stadium located in Arcata, California, and finished the season with a 4–6–1 overall record?

What are the two numerical south street designations of the Utah state highway that intersects a major north-south interstate highway via a single-point urban interchange in Murray, connects both sides of the I-215 beltway, is traversed by a bus route connecting Library Station (UTA) to Murray and Holladay, and passes under the TRAX light rail line serving the last northern terminus within Salt Lake City's Free Fare Zone for all three TRAX lines?

When was the fighter who defeated the American MMA fighter known for inventing the 'Vedepo Choke,' who previously was submitted by Rob Kimmons via first-round choke at UFC Fight Night 18 in April 2009, and later lost to Muhammed Lawal via TKO at Bellator 131 in November 2014, via first-round knockout at Bellator MMA on December 14, 2012 while in a half guard position born?
What English name is shared by both a rural area and a residential area near a coastal town in Dorset, located within the same county?
answer: Charminster, a village and civil parish, and Charminster, Bournemouth, a suburb of Bournemouth.

question: Who gave Eruna Ichinomiya the pamphlet that led her to choose the school featured in a 2015 Doga Kobo anime based on a light novel where the protagonist is a student with special powers fighting as a cultural club representative, which was simulcast by Funimation despite not being listed in concurrent release lists up to Fall 2013, and where a character voiced by Ari Ozawa appears?

In which year did the German footballer born in Leipzig, who currently plays for ZFC Meuselwitz, make his professional debut for FC Hansa Rostock in a 2. Bundesliga match against the Bundesliga club that Marcus Sorg served as head coach of briefly in 2011 before being dismissed?

Who directed the 1954 film starring an actress who later appeared in a 1956 Speed Lamkin-written television production originally intended for Rosalind Russell, and who also portrayed the daughter of the tavern owner in Ed Gardner's radio series 'Duffy's Tavern' while married to him at the time?

Which PTV play marked the beginning of the television career of the actress known for tough and autocratic roles, including a prominent part in the 1981 cult classic Dehleez, later starring in the 2015 series 'Maryam', portraying a character in the 2007 telenovela 'Man-o-Salwa', receiving a national honor, and winning a Hum Award for a role in 'Firaaq'?

When was the Ukrainian midfielder, who currently plays for the Belarusian football club that won the 2012 Belarusian Super Cup by defeating the previous year's Premier League champions, BATE Borisov, and was loaned to FC Tiraspol starting in July 2014 after developing through FC Chornomorets' youth system, born?

What was the population of the residential neighborhood in the southwest quadrant of Calgary, located at the city's western edge directly south of the Trans-Canada Highway and represented by the councillor of Ward 1 on the Calgary City Council, according to the 2012 municipal population assessment?
